TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Abdulla Yameen == ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 5, Abdulla Yameen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Maldives ta' misuw hya' ga Abdulla Yameen, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdulla Yameen tmasuq mqwas biru sa Beirut pqwsan biru krahu (American University of Beirut). Abdulla Yameen tmasuq mqwas biru sa Claremont 研究所 (Claremont Graduate University). qnxan nya Abdulla Yameen hiya' ga, sswe' ni Maumoon Abdul Gayoom. Fathimath Ibrahim ga, kneril ni Abdulla Yameen. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1978, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*ulla jameen == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, aβ*ulla jameen, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mal*i*es~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*ulla jameen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*ulla jameen tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βeirut pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (ameriʦ~ʨan uni*ers~ɕitj o* βeirut). aβ*ulla jameen tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨlaremont *** (ʦ~ʨlaremont ɣra*uate uni*ers~ɕitj). qnxan nja aβ*ulla jameen ħijaʔ ɣa, s~ɕs~ɕweʔ ni maumoon aβ*ul ɣajoom. *atħimatħ iβraħim ɣa, kneril ni aβ*ulla jameen. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: == Abdulla Yameen == ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 5, Abdulla Yameen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1959) mrhuw Maldives ta' misuw hya' ga Abdulla Yameen, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdulla Yameen tmasuq mqwas biru sa Beirut pqwsan biru krahu (American University of Beirut). Abdulla Yameen tmasuq mqwas biru sa Claremont 研究所 (Claremont Graduate University). qnxan nya Abdulla Yameen hiya' ga, sswe' ni Maumoon Abdul Gayoom. Fathimath Ibrahim ga, kneril ni Abdulla Yameen. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1978, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aβ*ulla jameen == rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, aβ*ulla jameen, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mal*i*es~ɕ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*ulla jameen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*ulla jameen tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βeirut pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu (ameriʦ~ʨan uni*ers~ɕitj o* βeirut). aβ*ulla jameen tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ʦ~ʨlaremont *** (ʦ~ʨlaremont ɣra*uate uni*ers~ɕitj). qnxan nja aβ*ulla jameen ħijaʔ ɣa, s~ɕs~ɕweʔ ni maumoon aβ*ul ɣajoom. *atħimatħ iβraħim ɣa, kneril ni aβ*ulla jameen. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
